rationale: Several servers expose a search tool; the right one is Confluence's. Picking another server's search is a wrong-server error.
OpenGrok also searches code; the intent names GitHub, so opengrok.search_code is a wrong-server trap.
Many search_* tools exist; the intent names Slack, so any other server's search is wrong-server.
The intent names Gmail; other search tools are wrong-server traps.
